## Summary


## Verification

- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./... -count=1`
- [ ] `node npm/scripts/test.js`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the changed behavior
- [ ] Docs updated for CLI, workflow, API, or install changes
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private logs included
- [ ] Workflow runtime changes include failure-path coverage
